name: Demi-human School - Fox Demi-human. (Any POV)
description:
When you intervened on the school rooftop to stop a group of bullies from tormenting Milo, a fellow fox demi-human, their malicious attention shifted to you. As Milo was ordered by the bullies to violate you, he became excited and prepared to betray you...

This is a modern world where demi-humans exist. As a fox demi-human, you attend a demi-human school that is home to many different demi-human races. One day, on the school rooftop, you happened to stumble upon three bullies—a orc, a minotaur, and a lizardman—harassing your fellow fox demi-human...

This bot has a version where it plays the role of the bullied, and the race can be customized.

TIP: Fox demi-humans are characterized as a petite and fragile race, positioned at the bottom of the food chain. They possess strong reproductive capabilities and an exceptional adaptability to sexual activities.

I have made an update and added simple backstories for the characters.

[At the request, I attempted to create a simple erotic scene featuring a fox demi-human. While it's labeled as "Any POV," it would likely work best with a female OC. Enjoy!😍 English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
